## Definition of Done Checklist
- [ ] All linked FR-IDs implemented
- [ ] Jest tests added (unit + integration where applicable)
- [ ] Lint, typecheck, format all clean (`lint` + `test` CI jobs green)
- [ ] No hardcoded strings (uses `src/locales/`)
- [ ] No hardcoded colors/spacing (uses theme tokens)
- [ ] No `console.log` — uses structured logger
- [ ] No `any` types without explicit comment justification
- [ ] No `// TODO` without a linked GitHub issue number
- [ ] Accessibility verified (accessibilityLabel on interactive elements)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Self-tested with debug APK from this PR's CI run
